hero.imageAlt: PERADA GROUP professionals working in the office
hero.headline: Build Your Career in a Growing Group
hero.subheadline: Join PERADA GROUP — two specialist entities in logistics and business operations serving corporate partners across Indonesia.

culture.title: Professional, Collaborative, and Results-Driven
culture.intro: At PERADA GROUP, every team member contributes to integrated solutions that make a real impact for corporate clients. We value initiative, cross-functional collaboration, and a commitment to the highest professional standards.
culture.introSecondaryHtml: With two entities — PT Perkasa Adi Yuda (logistics) and PT Perdana Adi Yuda (business operations & API-U imports) — you gain exposure to diverse projects and broader career development opportunities.

values.title: Teamwork
values.description: Cross-functional collaboration to solve client challenges holistically.

values.title: Quality Focus
values.description: High work standards and regulatory compliance in every project.

values.title: Growth
values.description: An environment that supports learning and competency development.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: A culture of respect, transparency, and long-term partnership.

benefits.title: Benefits of Working at PERADA GROUP
benefits.intro: More than a job — an opportunity to grow in a corporate services ecosystem that keeps expanding.

items.title: Clear Career Path
items.description: Structured training, mentoring, and promotion opportunities.

items.title: Two Entities, One Group
items.description: Exposure to logistics and business operations — including API-U import projects.

items.title: Real Corporate Projects
items.description: Work with leading corporate partners across various industries.

items.title: Supportive Environment
items.description: A collaborative culture that values every team member's contribution.

portal.title: Official Career Portal
portal.intro: All job openings and recruitment are handled through our official career portal. Find the right position, submit your application, and track your status in one place.

hrCta.text: Questions about the hiring process? Our HR team is ready to help.
